title: rubus × compactus
intro: Rubus × compactus, a hybrid of the raspberry plant, is a cross between the red raspberry (Rubus idaeus) and the black raspberry (Rubus occidentalis). This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its high content of anthocyanins, which have antioxidant and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Rubus × compactus include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting cognitive function, making it a potential treatment for conditions such as arthritis and Alzheimer's disease. Rubus × compactus can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or capsule, and is also used in the production of jams, jellies, and other food products.
